decision.reason: The procedural template has useful modular parts, bones, and morph hooks, but its visual likeness is less lively than the Hunyuan-generated mature_senpai mesh.
decision.nextStep: Use the Hunyuan mesh as the likeness base, then do Blender retopology, hand-authored face/hair/outfit cleanup, and rigging without replacing the silhouette with the procedural template.
